_meta.method: Searched Plum Village and Wake Up directories, Kwan Um School of Zen listings, and general Buddhist directories for Ghana; found no Zen centers or lay sanghas directly affiliated with Plum Village, Kwan Um, or AZI.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified Zen practice places in the specified lineages identified in Ghana).
knownGaps: Any Ghanaian meditation groups influenced by Thich Nhat Hanh or Korean Seon appear to be unlisted at the international level and may only advertise locally or on social media, making independent verification difficult.
The World Buddhist Directory's African listings still focus primarily on South African centers and do not show Ghana as having a Zen or Plum Village–related center.
